name: Szechuan Chicken (Kung Pao Chicken)
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken-breast halves, skinned, boned, and cubed (¾ in)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cubed chicken with the egg white and cornstarch. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Stir-fry chicken for 3 to 4 minutes until cooked through.
3. Add nuts, scallions, and remaining ingredients (dry sherry, hoisin sauce, black bean sauce, chili paste, vinegar, and sugar). Mix well and cook for an additional minute or two until heated thoroughly.
4. Serve immediately with rice.
